steps.name: Set text: G2_CS on element By.xpath: //input[@id='Username']
Set text: Tv@123 on element By.xpath: //input[@id='Password']
Click element: By.xpath: //span[contains(text(),'Thông tin đổi trả')] with time out 3
Click element: By.xpath: //a[@href='/dwr/GoodsReturn/index'] with time out 3
Check Element By.xpath: //input[@id='exchange_type'] is checked or not
Set text: Rosy Dương on element By.xpath: //input[@id='customer_name']
Set text: HD241821321 on element By.xpath: //input[@id='invoice_code']
Set text: Hàng lỗi on element By.xpath: //textarea[@id='reason_return']
Check Element By.xpath: //input[@id='exchange_return_payment_spec'] is checked or not
Click element: By.xpath: (//label[contains(text(),'Hình thức thanh toán trước đổi/trả')]/parent::div)/following-sibling::div//label[normalize-space()="COD"]
Click element: By.xpath: (//label[contains(text(),'Hình thức hoàn tiền')]/parent::div)/following-sibling::div//label[normalize-space()="Tiền mặt"]
Click element: By.xpath: //table[@id='bill_infor_table']/tbody/tr/th[1]//span[contains(text(),'Chọn mã sản phẩm')]
Set text: 123456789 on element By.xpath: //table[@id='bill_infor_table']/tbody/tr/th[6]//input[@class='product_seri form-control col-date']
Check Element By.xpath: //input[@id='returns_other'] is checked or not
Click element: By.xpath: //table[@id='update_info_table']/tbody/tr/th[1]//span[contains(text(),'Chọn mã sản phẩm')]
